# Everware

> Everware is a Dutch custom software agency building bespoke software, AI solutions and autonomous agents — with personal attention, built for stability and maintainability. Site: https://everware.nl (Dutch, canonical) and https://everware.nl/en/ (English).

Everware works for organizations that hit the limits of off-the-shelf software. One small team covers the full stack — from process analysis to years of maintenance — and starts from the client's process, not from a ready-made product. Clients own the code and the data.

## Services

- Process optimization: mapping processes and removing noise before building anything.
- Design & architecture: foundations designed for stability and growth (system design, roadmap, UX).
- Custom software: applications, platforms and internal tools built around the client's processes (web, native, mobile, integrations).
- AI solutions: production-grade custom AI — LLM applications, RAG, custom models.
- Autonomous agents: reliable, controllable agents with a human at the helm (workflows, tool-use, orchestration).
- Advisory: independent second opinions, strategy and guidance.

## How we work

Introduction call → brainstorm → on-site process inventory → design & architecture → build (test-driven, AI-driven, short visible iterations) → maintenance & evolution.

## Facts

- Legal: Dutch company, KvK (Chamber of Commerce) 89042786
- Email: hallo@everware.nl
- Phone: 073 208 9198
- Service area: Netherlands (remote-first, on-site when useful)
- Languages: Dutch (primary), English
